mapper.sql: select task_id, title, description, project_id, iteration_id, parent_id, task_type, priority, status, assignee_id, start_time, completed_at, estimated_hours, actual_hours, due_date, sort, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted, is_subtask, root_id, deleted_by, deleted_at, deleted_reason, story_points, remaining_hours from task where deleted = 0
mapper.select: and parent_id = #{parentId} and deleted = 0 order by sort desc
mapper.insert: insert into task (title, description, project_id, iteration_id, parent_id, task_type, priority, status, assignee_id, start_time, estimated_hours, due_date, sort, story_points, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_subtask, root_id) values (#{title}, #{description}, #{projectId}, #{iterationId}, #{parentId}, #{taskType}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{assigneeId}, #{startTime}, #{estimatedHours}, #{dueDate}, #{sort}, #{storyPoints}, #{createBy}, now(), #{updateBy}, now(), COALESCE(#{isSubtask}, 0), #{rootId})
mapper.update:
update task
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, iteration_id = #{iterationId}, parent_id = #{parentId}, task_type = #{taskType}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, start_time = #{startTime}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, estimated_hours = #{estimatedHours}, actual_hours = #{actualHours}, due_date = #{dueDate}, sort = #{sort}, is_subtask = #{isSubtask}, root_id = #{rootId}, story_points = #{storyPoints}, remaining_hours = #{remainingHours}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now()
where task_id = #{taskId} and deleted = 0
update task set deleted = 1, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, deleted_at = NOW() where task_id = #{taskId}
update task set deleted = 0, deleted_by = NULL, deleted_at = NULL, deleted_reason = NULL where task_id = #{taskId}
update task set deleted = 2 where task_id = #{taskId}
update task set deleted = 1, deleted_by = #{deletedBy}, deleted_at = NOW() where (parent_id = #{taskId} OR root_id = #{taskId}) and deleted = 0
mapper.select: select * from task where root_id = #{rootId} and deleted = 0
select count(*) from task where parent_id = #{parentId} and deleted = 0
select max(sort) from task where project_id = #{projectId} and deleted = 0
select max(sort) from task where parent_id = #{parentId} and deleted = 0
